title: A chromosome-level genome assembly of the bluethroat (Luscinia s. svecica; Linnaeus, 1758) uncovers the complex MHC region.
authors: Strand MA, Enevoldsen ELG, Tørresen OK et al.

title: Gene model for the ortholog of DENR in Drosophila grimshawi
authors: Lawson, M. E., Sanow, K. A., Fratian, M. et al.
abstract: Gene model for the ortholog of Density regulated protein (DENR) in the May 2011 (Agencourt dgri_caf1/DgriCAF1) Genome Assembly (GenBank Accession: GCA_000005155.1) of D. grimshawi. This ortholog was characterized as part of a developing dataset to study the evolution of the Insulin/insulin-like growth factor signaling pathway (IIS) across the genus Drosophila using the Genomics Education Partnership gene annotation protocol for Course-based Undergraduate Research Experiences.
relevance_reason: 高优先级关键词: genome assembly; 白名单关键词: genome assembly
